name: iOSPhotoEditor
summary: Native iOS photo editing library — crop, draw, text, stickers, emoji overlays with gesture support.
description: iOSPhotoEditor is a native iOS photo editing library that supports freehand drawing, text overlays with custom fonts and colors, sticker/emoji placement, cropping, and gesture-based scale/rotate. Maintained as the core native iOS dependency for @phucprime/react-native-image-editor.
